literal_meaning: bodily knot of grasping at rules and observances
preferred_translation: bodily knot of grasping at rules and observances
definition: A named member of the fourfold kāyagantha family.
notes: This compound should inherit the gantha headword policy while keeping the established rendering for sīlabbata-parāmāsa stable. Do not reduce it to generic ritualism or vague attachment to practice.

example_phrases.translation: grasping at rules and observances is a bodily knot
example_phrases.notes: Named member of the fourfold knot family.
